parameters.query: INSERT INTO complaints (complaint_token, reporter_name, reporter_email, reporter_phone, aadhaar_number, pan_number, address_line1, address_line2, city, state, pincode, nearest_police_station, incident_date, incident_type, incident_description, suspect_information, evidence_details, financial_loss, submission_date, status, pdf_url) VALUES ('{{ $json.complaint_token }}', '{{ $json.reporter_name }}', '{{ $json.reporter_email }}', '{{ $json.reporter_phone }}', '{{ $json.aadhaar_number }}', '{{ $json.pan_number }}', '{{ $json.address_line1 }}', '{{ $json.address_line2 }}', '{{ $json.city }}', '{{ $json.state }}', '{{ $json.pincode }}', '{{ $json.nearest_police_station }}', '{{ $json.incident_date }}', '{{ $json.incident_type }}', '{{ $json.incident_description }}', '{{ $json.suspect_information }}', '{{ $json.evidence_details }}', '{{ $json.financial_loss }}', '{{ $json.submission_date }}', 'pending', '{{ $json.pdf_url }}') RETURNING *
